meta.description: Professional with 9+ years in administration, operational logistics, and personnel management. Team leadership up to 35 people · Grupo Xcaret · Cancún, MX.

profile.name: Dafne Cuevas
profile.title: Operations Coordinator · Logistics & Administration · B.A. Communications

summary.label: Professional Summary
paragraphs: Results-driven operations coordinator. Professional with over 9 years of experience in administration, operational logistics, and personnel management, specialized in team coordination and incident resolution in dynamic, high-demand environments.

I have led teams of up to 35 people, optimizing operational processes, controlling resources, and ensuring daily goals are met. My tenure at Grupo Xcaret — both at the corporate level and in marina operations — allowed me to develop a comprehensive business vision: from logistics planning and inventory control to executive reporting and budget management in SAP.

I stand out for my organizational skills, agile decision-making, and customer focus. I seek to grow in positions where I can contribute leadership, operational efficiency, and tangible value to the team.

jobs.title: Independent Delivery & Logistics
bullets: Delivery management and route optimization for on-time order fulfillment.
Customer service and field incident resolution, ensuring end-user satisfaction.

jobs.title: Head of Operations (Marina)
bullets: Daily operations coordination and logistics route planning for the marina area.
Direct team supervision, ensuring quality and operational safety standards.
Operational inventory and supply control, reducing deviations and optimizing resource use.
Preparation and follow-up of administrative reports for management.
Customer incident resolution, ensuring service continuity and a high-quality experience.

jobs.title: Administrative Assistant
bullets: Management of department budget and petty cash with expense control.
Schedule organization and coordination of corporate internal events.
Preparation of reports and executive presentations for decision-making.

jobs.title: Administrative & Events Assistant
bullets: Coordination and logistics of institutional events and conferences.
Preparation of agreements and institutional documentation.
Liaison with universities and academic institutions.
